title: 8 Rules of Love
author: Jay Shetty
subline: Why love is not a feeling — it's a skill.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- 8 short rule-cards laid out as a grid (2 rows of 4). Each card has a hairline frame, a small number, and a one-word rule. One card is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 950)" fill="none">
    <!-- 8 cards: 2 rows x 4 cols, each card 240x180, gap 20 -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1">
      <rect x="-500" y="-200" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="-240" y="-200" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="20" y="-200" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="280" y="-200" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="-500" y="20" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="-240" y="20" width="240" height="180"/>
      <rect x="20" y="20" width="240" height="180"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The 5th rule card is RED -->
    <rect x="280" y="20" width="240" height="180" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Card contents: number + word -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="300" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-0.04em">
      <text x="-380" y="-150">01</text>
      <text x="-120" y="-150">02</text>
      <text x="140" y="-150">03</text>
      <text x="400" y="-150">04</text>
      <text x="-380" y="70">05</text>
      <text x="-120" y="70">06</text>
      <text x="140" y="70">07</text>
    </g>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="-380" y="-50">LET GO</text>
      <text x="-120" y="-50">LESSONS</text>
      <text x="140" y="-50">PAST</text>
      <text x="400" y="-50">PRACTICE</text>
      <text x="-380" y="170">COURAGE</text>
      <text x="-120" y="170">VULNERABILITY</text>
      <text x="140" y="170">TRUTH</text>
    </g>
    <!-- The 5th card text in white -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="32" font-weight="300" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-0.04em">
      <text x="400" y="70">08</text>
    </g>
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="400" y="170">SACRED</text>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">EIGHT RULES · ONE PRACTICE</text>
</svg>
rationale: Eight rule cards laid out as a 2x4 grid. The 8th rule (SACRED) is the only RED card — the final rule, the one that requires the most. 320px mixed-case '8 Rules / of Love' title in weight 300 sits at the bottom. The visual thesis: love is a set of rules you practice, with the final 'sacred' rule being the one that holds all the others.
